name: modern-pdf-lib-docs-tooling
description: Isolated TypeScript 6 sidecar for typedoc. TypeScript 7 (tsgo) dropped the JS compiler-API exports, and typedoc has no TS7-compatible path until ~7.1 — so the docs:api step resolves `typescript` from THIS folder (pinned to 6.x) instead of the project's bleeding-edge TS7.
